summary: Comprehensive testing of NetSentinel ThaiFriendly monitoring app - both backend APIs and frontend UI tested successfully
passed_tests: GET /api/ - NetSentinel API v1.0 message returned correctly
GET /api/settings - Settings retrieved with proper structure
Frontend Dashboard - Status hero displays current status with proper styling
Frontend Settings - All form inputs working (email, password, username, notification email, interval)
Frontend Controls - Start/Stop monitoring and Check Now buttons functional
Frontend History - Activity log panel displays correctly
Mobile responsiveness - Tabs work correctly on mobile view
Settings persistence - Form values saved and retrieved correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality works, minor selector issues with data-testid)
